Weekly Opening Hours

as of April 2026

Monday: closed
Tuesday: open 4pm, last seating 8pm
Wednesday: open 4pm, last seating 8pm
Thursday: open 4pm, last seating 8pm
Friday: open 4pm, last seating 9pm
Saturday: open 4pm, last seating 9pm
Sunday: open 3pm, last seating 8pm

our savory kitchen stays open for 45 minutes after our last seating; our bar and desserts station remains open a little longer though!
